title: Xtra Crunchy Turkish Cheese Kebabs
description: A winey and crunchy Turkish dish featuring monterey jack cheese, perfect for a post-workout meal
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the shredded monterey jack cheese, coconut cream, cracked black pepper, paprika, garlic powder, and salt until well combined.
Thread the cheese mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the outside is crispy.
While the skewers are baking, toast the pita bread slices by baking them in the oven for 2 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Once the skewers are done, remove them from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the skewers on top of the toasted pita bread, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
